projects.name: EventHub
projects.description: A Django-based web app where university societies manage events and memberships, and students can join, RSVP, and participate in discussions.

projects.name: Edunet
projects.description: A local-first offline classroom platform built with Flutter for chat, file sharing, and calls without internet.

projects.name: AURA Pro
projects.description: A single-page product showcase for AURA Pro headphones with interactive 3D viewing and scroll-led storytelling.

projects.name: Theo of Evolution
projects.description: A scroll-driven storytelling site about the evolution of life with theme selection and immersive scenes.
